narration: You got your credit card bill. Minimum payment: $104. Feels manageable, right? But that number was deliberately engineered to keep you in debt for sixteen years.
visual: SVG credit card springs in from top, statement box slides up showing $5,000 balance and MIN PAYMENT $104 highlighted in red. Headline: ENGINEERED TO TRAP YOU.

narration: On a $5,000 balance at 24% APR, pay only the minimum every month. You finish in 2042 — and you've paid $7,400 just in interest. That's 148% of what you originally borrowed.
visual: Animated timeline bar slowly stretching to 16 YEARS label, interest counter counting up to $7,400. Comparison boxes: $5,000 borrowed vs $12,400 paid back.

narration: Banks cap your minimum at just 2% of your balance. As you pay it down, the minimum shrinks — so you stay in debt even longer. It's a self-tightening trap.
visual: Bank building SVG, formula box showing 2% OF BALANCE OR $25 WHICHEVER IS HIGHER. Two animated progress bars showing balance and minimum payment both shrinking in sync.

narration: But bump your payment to $250 a month. Same five-thousand-dollar debt — gone in two years and four months. You'd save sixty-two hundred dollars. Same income, completely different outcome.
visual: Two horizontal comparison bars: red bar stretching to 16 YEARS for $104/month, short green bar for 2.4 YEARS at $250/month. Green $6,200 SAVED box springs in.

narration: The minimum payment is designed to feel responsible. Your brain checks 'bill paid' and relaxes. But you just agreed to repay nearly one-and-a-half times what you borrowed.
visual: Stylized brain SVG, green checkmark appears with BILL PAID label. Then red 148% stat pulses large, debt amount grows below it with label YOU AGREED TO THIS.

narration: Tonight, open your credit card statement. Find the 'if you pay minimum only' box — it's legally required to be there. That number is your bank's profit timeline. Now go ruin it.
visual: Credit card statement mockup with the legally required minimum payment warning box highlighted with red border and arrow. CTA text: FIND THIS BOX TONIGHT / NOW GO RUIN IT.
